rationale: No direct conflict, but increasing the homestead exemption amount requires appraisal districts and the comptroller to update cooperative implementation procedures to reflect the new $200,000 threshold.
quote: The chief appraiser of each appraisal district and the comptroller shall cooperate with the commissioner and school districts in implementing this chapter.
_note: Educ. Code §49.005 is a general cooperation mandate; the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change does not contradict it but necessitates updated rulemaking coordination.
